title: Claude Code Statusline Input Structure
description: JSON structure passed to statusline command scripts via stdin. Used by statusline.sh

_fields_used_by_statusline_sh.workspace.current_dir: Extracted with jq -r '.workspace.current_dir' → basename shown in statusline
_fields_used_by_statusline_sh.context_window.remaining_percentage: Used to compute true free space after autocompact buffer
_fields_used_by_statusline_sh.context_window.current_usage.*: Preferred over remaining_percentage: computes (in+cc+cr)/win*100 for precise usage

context_remaining._note: Based on TRUE free space = remaining_pct - autocompact_buffer (default 16.5%)
context_remaining.critical: ≤10% true free → Yellow fg on Red bg (\033[93;41m)
context_remaining.warning: ≤20% true free → Bright Red fg on Dark Gray bg (\033[91;48;5;237m)

autocompact_buffer._note: Subtracted from remaining_pct to get usable space
autocompact_buffer.default: 16.5% (observed; docs claim 5% but compaction triggers at ~78-85%)

_usage_notes.stdin_input: This JSON is passed to statusline scripts via stdin (read with 'cat' in bash)
_usage_notes.jq_extraction: All fields extracted in a single jq call, tab-delimited, via bash read
_usage_notes.fallback_values: Use // operator for optional fields: jq -r '.version // ""'
